title: bus.saga v1
description: Correlation envelope for multi-bead plans (migrations, feature campaigns, etc). Attach saga_id to every child event so hearth-loom and deer-flow can track a coordinated campaign as a unit. The saga event itself fires at plan creation; child events carry saga_id in their data.

saga_id.description: Stable ULID assigned at plan creation. All child beads and lifecycle events reference this.
